scripts.install:all: npm run install:frontend && npm run install:backend
scripts.dev:tauri: python scripts/prepare_local_assets.py && npm --prefix frontend run tauri dev
scripts.package: python scripts/prepare_local_assets.py && npm --prefix frontend run tauri build
scripts.package:windows: python scripts/prepare_local_assets.py && npm --prefix frontend run tauri build -- --bundles nsis
